---
title: "Personnel"
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.7.2/css/all.min.css">

```{=html}
<style>

/* 头像样式 */
.profile {
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: 30%;
  display: block;
  background: #444;
}
.columns > .column:first-child {
  padding-right: 50px;
}

.Alumni-nav{
    display:block;
    width:150px;
    margin:40px auto;
    padding:12px 24px;
    text-align:center;
    background:#2ca25f;
    color:white;
    text-decoration:none;
    border-radius:999px;
    transition:.2s;
}

.Alumni-nav:hover{
    background:#238b45;
    transform:translateY(-2px);
}

</style>
```

## Principal Investigator

::::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](images/Members/jack.jpg){.profile}
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
### Dr. Cheng Jack Song

Professor

Kidney organoids · Kidney disease · Genomics
:::
:::::

## Staff

::::: columns
::: {.column width="22%"}
![](images/Trang.png){.profile}
:::

::: {.column width="78%"}
### Trang

Lab Manager

Responsible for laboratory management, colony, and daily operations.
:::
:::::

::::: columns
::: {.column width="22%"}
![](Members/Alex.jpg){.profile}
:::

::: {.column width="78%"}
### Alex

<a href="mailto:aig@uab.edu"><i class="fa-regular fa-envelope" style="color: #2ca25f;"></i></a> <a href="https://github.com/yourname" target="_blank"><i class="fa-brands fa-github" style="color: #ffffff;"></i></a>

Research Technician

Single-cell RNA-seq · Single-cell ATAC-seq · Computational biology
:::
:::::

## Students

::::: columns
::: {.column width="22%"}
![](images/people/person2.jpg){.profile}
:::

::: {.column width="78%"}
### A

Ph.D. Student

Disease mechanisms
:::
:::::

<a class="Alumni-nav" href="alumni.html"> View Alumni </a>
